patterns_recognized: F3-sole-signal DOWNGRADE trigger: when F3_swing_take_gap is the only F-signal firing and SP-edge-against + PQI-against both oppose the pick, mandatory DOWNGRADE regardless of F3 magnitude — validated on 05-18 WSH@NYM (lost 16-7), 05-21 staked WSH@NYM loss (2-1), 05-21 STL@PIT (lost 6-2).

D-grade dual-signal-against directional unreliability: picks where both SP-edge AND PQI simultaneously oppose the model direction at D-grade tier hit 7/9 directional losses through 05-21 — treat as elevated failure risk, not merely uncertain.

SP substitution risk: when the statsapi probable pitcher differs from the CSV-graded starter, the F1/F2 xERA-based signals are unreliable — DOWNGRADE when the replacement is meaningfully weaker than the graded SP.
HARD CAP 1 negative-edge is EV-protective and directionally neutral (50% hit rate over full archive); never relax for any level of F-signal conviction.

C-grade GOLD without SP-xERA agreement or PQI >= +5 is insufficient to elevate — 05-21 sole staked pick (WSH@NYM grade C, F3-alone) lost 2-1; C-grade picks require at least one of those anchors to CONFIRM.

PIT @ TOR.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 correctly prevents stake on -0.18pp negative edge. Dylan Cease (TOR home) confirmed by statsapi — elite SP supporting F1_xera_gap=2.02 directionally. However, f5_full_delta=0.1794 and confidence_downgrade=True add caution to the full-game bullpen-carry thesis. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0138 (TOR slightly worse bullpen) is a mild late-game headwind. Market fair_prob=0.5425 nearly aligns with model. CONFIRM cap enforcement; no stake.

MIN @ BOS.reasoning: HARD CAP 5 correctly limits conviction: F1_xera_gap=1.10* thin-sample asterisk without F2/F3/PQI backup. Bailey Ober (MIN away) vs Sonny Gray (BOS home) confirmed by statsapi — Gray is a strong veteran home pitcher whose quality may not be fully captured by Ober's xERA advantage. fair_prob=0.4041 below 0.42 floor prevents any stake regardless. Stage 1/2 agree (delta=0.066) is a mild positive. CONFIRM B-grade cap; MIN direction is marginal.

CLE @ PHI.reasoning: D-grade with dual-signal-against PHI: SP edge 1.43 xERA favors Parker Messick (CLE away) over Andrew Painter (PHI home), and PQI delta=-18.9 strongly favors CLE late-game. CLE is 31-23 vs PHI 26-26. edge=+22.9pp lands in calibration_caution_18_25pp band consistent with calibrator overconfidence. SOFT CAP 6.5 correctly notes this band. CONFIRM SKIP; PHI direction structurally suspect given dual-signal opposition.
lessons_applied: SOFT CAP 6.5 calibration-caution band edge in (18,25]pp
SP edge + PQI simultaneously opposing pick at D-grade

TB @ NYY.reasoning: statsapi confirms SP substitution: Shane McClanahan (TB) replaced by Drew Rasmussen; Will Warren (NYY) replaced by Ryan Weathers. The model graded F3_swing_take_gap=6667.3 against Warren specifically — that signal basis is now invalidated. Edge +1.93pp is below the 4pp floor (no stake regardless), and confidence_downgrade=True plus hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.013 (TB slightly worse bullpen) add headwinds. DOWNGRADE to SKIP given SP substitution undermines scoring basis.
lessons_applied: SP substitution invalidates F-signal scoring basis

STL @ CIN.reasoning: D-grade with dual-signal-against CIN (SP edge 0.41 xERA favors Liberatore over Singer, PQI delta=-3.8 against CIN) — but BOTH signals are small in magnitude. Countervailing: hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0039 (CIN slightly better bullpen) supports the full-game win thesis, and pen_strain=0.1253 (HIGH) signals CIN's lineup can punish STL's relief. f5_full_delta=0.1694 is a caution. CONFIRM SKIP; D-grade captures genuine uncertainty on small opposing signals.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against with small-magnitude signals softens trigger
CIN bullpen advantage partially offsets full-game headwind
pen_strain HIGH collision risk supports CIN offense

SEA @ KC.reasoning: Strong D-grade dual-signal-against KC: SP edge 1.78 xERA strongly favors Bryan Woo (SEA away) over Seth Lugo, and PQI delta=-37.2 is the largest PQI headwind on the entire slate. KC is 21-31 vs SEA 25-28. fair_prob=0.4196 below 0.42 floor confirms market also skeptical of KC. CONFIRM SKIP; KC direction is among the weakest on the slate.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against pattern — both SP and PQI strongly opposing
PQI delta=-37.2 extreme headwind (largest on slate)

LAD @ MIL.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 prevents stake on -10.0pp negative edge. Yamamoto (LAD) vs Sproat (MIL) confirmed by statsapi. F1*+F2+PQI confirms LAD (delta=-14.8) + better bullpen (gap=-0.0067) + Stage 1/2 agree (delta=0.025) form a clean directional stack. Market fair_prob=0.6133 validates LAD's true advantage over model's 51.33% — 10pp negative edge correctly capped. LAD direction sound; CONFIRM cap, no stake.
lessons_applied: better bullpen gap confirms late-game edge

CHW @ SF.reasoning: HARD CAP 10 correctly assigned score=0 (C). Stage 1/2 disagree massively (delta=0.212): CHW expected to lose F5 at 34.83% but win full game at 56.03% via bullpen — yet hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0099 shows CHW's bullpen is slightly WORSE than SF's, undermining the late-game carry thesis. F2_xwoba_gap=0.035 supports CHW lineup vs SF (21-31 poor team). Grade C correctly reflects contradictory signals. Not elevating.
lessons_applied: Stage 1/2 disagree with worse bullpen undermines full-game thesis
contradictory signal stack = do not elevate C-grade

COL @ ARI.reasoning: Grade C (score=0) correctly reflects Stage 1/2 disagreement (delta=0.197) and stacked flags (bullpen_fatigue, confidence_downgrade). ARI hosts a weak COL squad (20-33 away) with F3_swing_take_gap=2014 supporting ARI's lineup. Ryne Nelson (ARI) vs Quintana (COL) confirmed. No Coors inflation factor (COL is away from Coors). hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0041 near-zero. ARI's quality edge over COL is real; C-grade prevents staking while preserving direction. CONFIRM.
lessons_applied: COL away removes Coors artifact concern

WSH @ ATL.reasoning: Classic F3-sole-signal DOWNGRADE trigger: F3=1409.2 is the only F-signal for WSH, while SP 0.54 xERA favors Pérez (ATL home) over Griffin (WSH away) AND PQI delta=+13.6 runs against WSH. fair_prob=0.3384 — market prices ATL as a 66% favorite; ATL is 36-17 (best NL record). Pattern validated on 05-18 WSH@NYM (lost 16-7). DOWNGRADE to SKIP: F3-alone cannot overcome SP + PQI + strong market signal.
lessons_applied: F3-sole-signal with SP-edge-against + PQI-against = mandatory DOWNGRADE
05-18 WSH@NYM blowout pattern repeat — F3-alone insufficient
